definitions: A pre-designed format or structure that can be used as a starting point for creating something new.
A pattern, mold, or gauge used as a guide to the shape of a piece being made.
In molecular biology, a molecule of DNA or RNA that serves as a pattern for the synthesis of a new molecule.
examples: The website offers various templates for resumes.
Use the template to cut the fabric accurately.
The viral RNA serves as a template for reverse transcription.
